assays_ss_tst_tp: Type of test conducted (e.g., In vivo).
assays_ss_strn: Strain of the test subject (e.g., Sprague-Dawley rat).
assays_dscrptn: Description of the assay or test conducted.
assays_src_ss_d: Source sample designation identifier (empty in samples).
assays_chmbl_d: Chemical substance identifier in ChEMBL database.
assays_ss_sbclllr_frctn: Subcellular fraction used in assay (e.g., Microsomes).
assays_ss_rgnsm: Species used in assay (e.g., Rattus norvegicus).
assays_ss_cll_tp: Cell type used in assay (e.g., Hepatocyte).
